sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61355" key="kwnwposfra/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωνωπ-οσφράντης</orth>, <pb n="1019" TEIform="pb"/> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n61355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Gnat-smeller</tr_>, name of a parasite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
